system.description:
### Tier 4 Traversal / Psychological The biomechanical interior of a Reaper. Pulsating tubes of liquid sentient species, whispers in the mind, and shifting gravity. It is the belly of the beast. Impulses: Corrupt the soul, bend the will, offer false salvation.

#### Features Indoctrination - Countdown: Setup a Consequence Countdown (6) named "Indoctrination" for each PC. Every time a PC fails a roll with Fear, mark a box. When a PC's countdown is filled, the GM takes the Spotlight for that character, forcing them to either attack an ally, freeze in Paralysis, or drop their weapon in "submission." After this action, clear the countdown.

What lies is the Reaper whispering to you? Whose voice does it use to trick you?

Organic Gravity - Reaction: The Reaper's internal orientation is non-Euclidean. When a PC fails with Fear, the floor becomes the ceiling. The PC must make an Instinct Reaction Roll (20) or fall, becoming Vulnerable until their next spotlight and taking 1d10 Direct Damage.

Does your stomach churn as the world spins? Can you find your footing on the pulsating walls?

Sentient Attrition - Action: Mark a Stress. The core pulses with a psychic scream. All PCs must make a Presence Reaction Roll (20). On a failure, they cannot spend Hope until they successfully hit an enemy, as their resolve is temporarily shattered by the Reaper's overwhelming presence.

How do you maintain your sense of self against the weight of a machine-god's mind? }}
